message:
🌱 Add more common commands to allowed permissions

- git checkout, fetch, pull, clone, -C flag
- cd, mkdir, rm -rf /tmp (for temp cleanup)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,14 @@
       "Bash(git branch:*)",
       "Bash(git remote:*)",
       "Bash(git show:*)",
+      "Bash(git checkout:*)",
+      "Bash(git fetch:*)",
+      "Bash(git pull:*)",
+      "Bash(git clone:*)",
+      "Bash(git -C:*)",
+      "Bash(cd:*)",
+      "Bash(mkdir:*)",
+      "Bash(rm -rf /tmp:*)",
       "Bash(gh pr:*)",
       "Bash(gh run:*)",
       "Bash(gh issue:*)",
